page.title: Dashboard
page.subtitle: Welcome back! Here's your financial overview.
page.not-available-subtitle: You do not have any widgets!

paybills.title: Pay Bills Instantly
paybills.description: Settle your utilities, internet, and mobile balance in just a few clicks.

transfers.title: Easy Transfers
transfers.description: Send money to any account safely and quickly with our improved system.

loans.title: Flexible Loans
loans.description: Apply for a personalized loan with competitive rates tailored for you.

welcome.title: Welcome to Your Dashboard!
welcome.desc: This is your financial command center. Let's take a quick tour to show you around all the amazing features available to you.

navigation.title: Navigation Hub
navigation.desc: Your complete navigation menu with access to all features:

messages.title: Messages
messages.desc: Stay connected with your banking messages. The red badge will show you unread messages counting waiting for your attention. Click to view, compose, and manage your inbox.

notifications.title: Notifications Center
notifications.desc: Keep track of all your account activities, security alerts, and important updates. Click here to view, manage, and delete notifications. The red dot indicates unread notifications.

widgets.title: Your Customizable Widgets
widgets.desc: Personalize your dashboard with three powerful widgets that provide real-time financial insights:

finish.title: You're All Set!
finish.desc: You now know how to navigate and use your dashboard effectively. You can restart this tour anytime by clicking the help button in the top right. Happy banking!

products.title: My Products
products.description: Manage accounts, cards, and view 3D card designs

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.description: View and filter all your transaction history

transfers.title: Transfers
transfers.description: Send money between accounts and to others

loans.title: Loans
loans.description: Apply for and manage your loans

finances.title: My Finances
finances.description: Track income, expenses, and savings with charts

paybill.title: Paybill
paybill.description: Pay bills, create templates, and manage groups

transactions.title: Recent Transactions
transactions.description: View your latest transactions with details. Adjust display count (5-20) and use the repeat button for quick re-payments.

accounts.title: Accounts Overview
accounts.description: Monitor all account balances, see recent changes, hide/show balances with the eye icon, and add new accounts.

exchange.title: Live Exchange Rates
exchange.description: Stay updated with real-time currency and cryptocurrency values. Click refresh for the latest market data.

pro-tip.title: Pro Tip: Grab any widget by the grip icon (⠿) and drag to reorder!
